name: Lab Grown Diamond Alternating Wedding Band | Stackable Bridal Sparkle | 18K

sellingList.light: lab-grown diamond center stone — certified, conflict-free, and chemically identical to a mined diamond.
Hand-set in 18K for lasting brilliance, with a comfort-fit band designed for everyday wear.
Ethically created and ready to propose with — includes a grading certificate and luxury gift packaging.

faqList.question: Are the diamonds lab-grown or mined?
faqList.answer: Every center stone is a lab-grown diamond — optically and chemically identical to a mined diamond, fully certified and 100% conflict-free.

faqList.question: How do I choose my ring size?
faqList.answer: Select your size at checkout. Not sure? We include one free resizing within 30 days of delivery.

faqList.question: What is the band made of?
faqList.answer: Solid 14K/18K gold or platinum exactly as selected — hypoallergenic, nickel-free, and built to last.

faqList.question: Do you offer free shipping and returns?
faqList.answer: Yes — free fully-insured shipping worldwide, plus hassle-free 30-day returns.

faqList.question: Does it come with a certificate?
faqList.answer: Each ring ships with an independent diamond grading certificate and a luxury gift box.
